git-undo.description: Undo last commit keeping changes staged

git-amend.description: Amend last commit with currently staged changes

git-stash-show.command: git stash list && echo '---' && git stash show -p stash@{0} 2>/dev/null
git-stash-show.description: List stashes and show latest diff

git-branch-clean.command: git branch --merged main | grep -v main | xargs -r git branch -d
git-branch-clean.description: Delete branches already merged into main

git-diff-stat.description: Show diff stats for last N commits
